prompt: Create a cinematic close-up product lifestyle photograph in a dark rocky cave, showing only the right side of a person and their raised hand holding a faceted black perfume bottle labeled ODYSSEY EAU DE PARFUM. The person wears a black technical jacket with ribbed, pleated sleeves and a small orange zipper accent; their head is partially visible at the far right with very short pale pink hair, but the face is intentionally obscured by a large soft-edged rectangular censor block in warm brown tones. The hand presses the atomizer, releasing a fine visible mist plume drifting leftward through the air. The background is a narrow rugged cave or volcanic rock passage with rough black-gray stone walls, shallow depth of field, and a warm orange flame or torch glow blurred in the center-left distance. Use moody high-contrast lighting, natural skin texture, realistic spray particles, dark emerald-black shadows, subtle film grain, and an editorial adventure-fragrance campaign aesthetic. Landscape 16:9 composition, product and hand in sharp focus slightly right of center, cave walls framing the scene, no extra text, no watermark.
